AMFPlus - User-Agent reference list and regex patterns
Version: 1.0
Purpose: practical test dataset for AMFPlus device detection

IMPORTANT NOTE
--------------
There is no finite or complete list of all User-Agent strings.
User-Agent values change by browser version, OS version, device model, embedded webview,
application, OEM browser, privacy policy and User-Agent Client Hints adoption.

This file contains a broad representative dataset useful for testing AMFPlus detection:
- mobile phones
- tablets
- Samsung and Android OEM-specific devices
- desktop browsers
- smart TVs and connected TV devices
- consoles
- set-top boxes
- e-readers
- automotive and wearable browsers
- bots and crawlers
- suggested regex patterns for AMFPlus repository files

Recommended AMFPlus classification priority:
1. Bot / crawler
2. Console
3. TV / connected TV / set-top box
4. Tablet
5. Mobile phone
6. Desktop
7. Unknown

============================================================
SECTION 1 - IPHONE / IOS SAFARI
============================================================

Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 15_8 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/15.8 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_7 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/16.7 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_6 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.6 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 18_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/18.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 18_5 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/18.5 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 26_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/26.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1

============================================================

SECTION 31 - BOTS / CRAWLERS / PREVIEW AGENTS
============================================================

Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; Googlebot/2.1; +http://www.google.com/bot.html) Chrome/W.X.Y.Z Safari/537.36
Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 6.0.1; Nexus 5X Build/MMB29P) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/W.X.Y.Z Mobile Safari/537.36 (compatible; Googlebot/2.1; +http://www.google.com/bot.html)
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; bingbot/2.0; +http://www.bing.com/bingbot.htm)
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; YandexBot/3.0; +http://yandex.com/bots)
DuckDuckBot/1.1; (+http://duckduckgo.com/duckduckbot.html)
facebookexternalhit/1.1 (+http://www.facebook.com/externalhit_uatext.php)
Twitterbot/1.0
LinkedInBot/1.0
Slackbot-LinkExpanding 1.0 (+https://api.slack.com/robots)
Discordbot/2.0
TelegramBot (like TwitterBot)
WhatsApp/2.24.10.79 A
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; AhrefsBot/7.0; +http://ahrefs.com/robot/)
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; SemrushBot/7~bl; +http://www.semrush.com/bot.html)
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; MJ12bot/v1.4.8; http://mj12bot.com/)
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; Baiduspider/2.0; +http://www.baidu.com/search/spider.html)
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; Applebot/0.1; +http://www.apple.com/go/applebot)

============================================================
SECTION 32 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: MOBILE
============================================================

# Generic mobile
Mobile|Mobi|Android.*Mobile|iPhone|iPod|Windows Phone|IEMobile|BlackBerry|BB10|Opera Mini|Opera Mobi

# Samsung Galaxy phones
SAMSUNG.*Mobile|SM-G[0-9A-Z]+|SM-S[0-9A-Z]+|SM-A[0-9A-Z]+|SM-M[0-9A-Z]+|SM-N[0-9A-Z]+|SM-F[0-9A-Z]+

# Samsung Internet mobile
SamsungBrowser/[0-9.]+.*Mobile

# Samsung foldables
SM-F7[0-9A-Z]+|SM-F9[0-9A-Z]+|Galaxy Z Fold|Galaxy Z Flip

# Huawei / Honor
HUAWEI|HONOR|HuaweiBrowser|VOG-[A-Z0-9]+|ANA-[A-Z0-9]+|ELS-[A-Z0-9]+|LIO-[A-Z0-9]+|LYA-[A-Z0-9]+|PRA-[A-Z0-9]+|MAR-[A-Z0-9]+|JNY-[A-Z0-9]+

# Xiaomi / Redmi / POCO / Mi Browser
Xiaomi|Redmi|POCO|MiuiBrowser|Mi Browser|MIX [0-9A-Z]+|M[0-9]{4}[A-Z0-9]+

# Oppo / OnePlus / Realme
OPPO|CPH[0-9]+|OnePlus|NE[0-9]{4}|GM[0-9]{4}|IN[0-9]{4}|KB[0-9]{4}|LE[0-9]{4}|RMX[0-9]+|RealmeBrowser

# Vivo / iQOO
vivo|VIVO|iQOO|V[0-9]{4}[A-Z0-9]*

# Motorola / Lenovo phones
motorola|Moto G|Moto E|Moto Z|moto g|moto e|XT[0-9]{4}|Lenovo.*Mobile

# Sony / Asus / Nokia / Nothing
Xperia|SonyEricsson|ASUS_[A-Z0-9]+|ROG Phone|Nokia|Nothing Phone

# Google Pixel phones
Pixel [0-9]+|Pixel [0-9]+ Pro|Pixel [0-9]+a|Pixel Fold

# Amazon Fire phone / Silk mobile
Silk/.*Mobile|Kindle.*Mobile

============================================================
SECTION 33 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: TABLET
============================================================

# Generic tablet
Tablet|iPad|Android(?!.*Mobile)|PlayBook

# Samsung tablets
SM-T[0-9A-Z]+|SM-X[0-9A-Z]+|Galaxy Tab|SAMSUNG.*Tablet

# Samsung Internet tablet, no Mobile token
SamsungBrowser/[0-9.]+(?!.*Mobile).*Safari

# Lenovo tablets
Lenovo TB-|Lenovo.*Tablet|TB-[0-9A-Z]+|TB[0-9A-Z]+

# Huawei / Honor tablets
HUAWEI.*Tablet|HONOR.*Tablet|MediaPad|MatePad|AGS[0-9A-Z-]+|BAH[0-9A-Z-]+|BTV-[A-Z0-9]+

# Xiaomi / Redmi / POCO tablets
Xiaomi Pad|Redmi Pad|Mi Pad|POCO Pad

# Amazon Fire / Kindle tablets
Kindle|Silk|KF[A-Z0-9]+|KFTT|KFOT|KFJWI|KFJWA|KFSUWI|KFMAWI|KFTRWI|KFMUWI

# Google / Pixel tablets
Pixel Tablet|Nexus 7|Nexus 9|Nexus 10

# Other Android tablets
Nokia T[0-9]+|OPD[0-9]+|Vivo Pad|OPPO Pad|OnePlus Pad|Realme Pad

============================================================
SECTION 34 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: TOUCH
============================================================

Touch|Mobile|Mobi|Tablet|iPhone|iPad|iPod|Android|Windows Phone|IEMobile
SAMSUNG|SM-G|SM-S|SM-A|SM-M|SM-N|SM-F|SM-T|SM-X|SamsungBrowser
Pixel|Xiaomi|Redmi|POCO|HUAWEI|HONOR|OPPO|CPH|OnePlus|RMX|Realme|vivo|VIVO|iQOO|motorola|Moto|Lenovo|Xperia|Nokia|Nothing Phone|ASUS|ROG Phone
Kindle|Silk|KF[A-Z0-9]+
Nintendo Switch|Steam Deck|Wear OS|WatchOS|Android Automotive

============================================================
SECTION 35 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: TV / CONNECTED TV / SET-TOP BOX
============================================================

TV|SmartTV|SMART-TV|Smart-TV|HbbTV|NetCast|WebTV|DTV|CE-HTML
SMART-TV.*Tizen|Tizen.*TV|SamsungBrowser.*TV|SAMSUNG.*TV
Web0S|webOS|WebAppManager|LG Browser|LG NetCast
Android TV|GoogleTV|Google TV|BRAVIA|SHIELD Android TV|NVIDIA SHIELD|Chromecast|ADT-[0-9]+
Fire TV|AFT[A-Z0-9]+|AFTM|AFTT|AFTS|AFTSS|AFTMM|AFTKA|AFTKM|AFTSO|AFTDCT31
Roku|RokuBrowser|Roku/DVP|RokuOS|Roku OS
AppleTV|Apple TV|tvOS
SetTopBox|STB|IPTV|Freebox|Bouygues|OrangeTV|SkyQ|Sky Q|NOW TV|VodafoneTV|Vodafone TV|TIMVISION|Ziggo|KPN|Foxtel|Comcast|Xfinity|VirginMedia
MiBOX|Mi Box|MiTV|Mi TV|Xiaomi TV|Realtek|Amlogic|Hisense|TCL|VIDAA

============================================================
SECTION 36 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: CONSOLE
============================================================

PlayStation|PlayStation 3|PlayStation 4|PlayStation 5|PlayStation Vita|PS3|PS4|PS5|PS Vita
Xbox|Xbox One|Xbox Series X|Xbox Series S|Xbox 360
Nintendo Switch|NintendoBrowser|WifiWebAuthApplet|Nintendo WiiU|Nintendo Wii U|Nintendo Wii|Nintendo 3DS|New Nintendo 3DS|Nintendo DSi
Steam Deck|SteamOS|Valve Steam
GameConsole|Game Console|Console

============================================================
SECTION 37 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: DESKTOP
============================================================

Windows NT|Macintosh|X11|Linux x86_64|CrOS|Ubuntu|Fedora|Debian
Chrome/[0-9.]+.*Safari/[0-9.]+|Firefox/[0-9.]+|Edg/[0-9.]+|Version/[0-9.]+.*Safari/[0-9.]+

============================================================
SECTION 38 - RECOMMENDED REGEX: BOT / CRAWLER
============================================================

Googlebot|bingbot|YandexBot|DuckDuckBot|facebookexternalhit|Twitterbot|LinkedInBot|Slackbot|Discordbot|TelegramBot|WhatsApp|AhrefsBot|SemrushBot|MJ12bot|Baiduspider|Applebot|bot|crawler|spider|preview

============================================================
SECTION 39 - UA CLIENT HINTS NOTES
============================================================

For modern Chromium browsers, User-Agent reduction means that device model and detailed OS data
may be missing or generic in the classic User-Agent string.

AMFPlus should combine classic User-Agent parsing with Client Hints when available:
- Sec-CH-UA
- Sec-CH-UA-Mobile
- Sec-CH-UA-Platform
- Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version
- Sec-CH-UA-Model
- Sec-CH-UA-Arch

Recommended fallback logic:
- Sec-CH-UA-Mobile = ?1 -> mobile candidate
- Sec-CH-UA-Mobile = ?0 and platform Android -> tablet / TV / desktop candidate depending on UA tokens
- Sec-CH-UA-Model present -> use model refinement
- User-Agent contains Android + Mobile -> mobile
- User-Agent contains Android without Mobile -> tablet candidate, unless TV/console tokens are found
- User-Agent contains SMART-TV / Tizen / webOS / Roku / AFT / Android TV -> TV
- User-Agent contains PlayStation / Xbox / Nintendo / Steam Deck -> console

END OF FILE
